description.zh-Hans: 从种子位置开始，对连通区域进行泛洪填充。
description.en: Flood-fills a connected region starting from a seed position.

triggers.zh-Hans: 填充, 泛洪填充, 油漆桶, 区域填充
triggers.en: flood fill, paint bucket, area fill, region fill

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 使用容差填充对像素艺术中的封闭区域进行颜色替换。
exampleUsage.en: Replace colors in a closed region of pixel art with tolerance-based flood fill.
